section.heading: Acquisition of non-Federal land within boundaries of recreational area

content.p: Section 101102 of title 54 is amended to extend the authority of the Secretary of the Interior, contained therein, to the Cape Hatteras National Seashore Recreational Area.

note.heading: Codification
note.p: In text, “Section 101102 of title 54” substituted for “the Act of August 31, 1954 (68 Stat. 1037),” on authority of Pub. L. 113–287, § 6(e), Dec. 19, 2014, 128 Stat. 3272, which Act enacted Title 54, National Park Service and Related Programs.
